name: SPX Technologies, Inc.
business: SPX Technologies, Inc. is a diversified, global supplier of highly specialized, engineered solutions serving the HVAC and detection and measurement markets. HVAC solutions include package and process cooling products, engineered air movement and handling solutions, and hydronic and electrical heating and ventilation products. Detection and measurement product lines encompass underground pipe and cable locators, inspection and rehabilitation equipment, robotic systems, transportation systems, communication technologies, and aids to navigation.
sellsTo: industrial markets (including data center and power generation)

exposures.sentence: HVAC solutions offered by our businesses include package and process cooling products and engineered air movement and handling solutions for the industrial (including data center and power generation), institutional, and commercial markets.

Our detection and measurement product lines encompass underground pipe and cable locators, inspection and rehabilitation equipment, robotic systems, transportation systems, communication technologies, and aids to navigation.

Our detection and measurement solutions enable utilities, telecommunication providers and regulators, defense agencies, and municipalities and transit authorities to build, monitor and maintain vital infrastructure.

catalysts.event: Recognition of HVAC backlog as revenue
catalysts.sentence: Approximately 83% of the segment's backlog as of December 31, 2025 is expected to be recognized as revenue during 2026.

catalysts.event: Recognition of Detection and Measurement backlog as revenue
catalysts.sentence: Approximately 66% of the segment's backlog as of December 31, 2025 is expected to be recognized as revenue during 2026.

catalysts.event: Execution of large data center projects
catalysts.sentence: down payments received on large data center projects scheduled to execute in 2026 and 2027

catalysts.event: Completion of facility expansion for air movement and cooling products
catalysts.sentence: During the fourth quarter of 2025, we entered into an agreement to purchase land and buildings related to a new facility. This property will be enhanced through acquisition and installation of further machinery and equipment in 2026 to increase the capacity for our engineered air movement and handling and cooling products businesses.

catalysts.event: Sale of Crawford's non-core Industrial & Transportation Products businesses
catalysts.sentence: Crawford's Industrial & Transportation Products businesses, which includes businesses serving aerospace, defense, transportation, and marine markets, is non-core to our long-term strategy. These non-core businesses will be recorded as assets held for sale, with their results reported as discontinued operations while we identify suitable buyer(s) and execute our plan to sell these businesses within twelve months.
